title: CellAddress
description: CellAddress: Object representing a cell address: its column index as string and row index as integer.

Column.description: Column index as string, starting from 'A'.

Row.description: Row index as integer, starting from 1.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
